title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
Moderate thunderstorms are expected for Germany, Czechia and Poland on June 28th 2026, with the highest risk bein ENHD
ENHD
Germany, Czechia & Poland
Moderate scattered thunderstorms acompanied with Hail and strong wind gusts especially in Poland

Most of the storms should initiate towards the night, and in Germany they should persist until the afternoon of 29th June.

Due to high amounts of CIN i am not completely sure if thunderstorms initiate, but a convergence line will be present, making it the main trigger.
